properties: Lendneria ageratifolia is a plant species that is used in traditional medicine, and it is believed to possess various therapeutic properties. Research has shown that extracts from the plant exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. These properties may contribute to its potential use in treating various health conditions, such as wound healing, skin infections, and respiratory diseases.
